text.title: documentation Core Rules
text.summary: Five rules for the Faion CLAUDE.md + AGENTS.md documentation convention.

rule.statement: `CLAUDE.md` in every directory contains exactly one line: `@AGENTS.md`. No other content.
rule.rationale: Convention forks confuse Claude Code's auto-loader. One canonical entrypoint pattern keeps the agent's mental model stable.

rule.statement: `AGENTS.md` is 20-80 lines (hard cap: 120). It covers: purpose, file table, key types, commands, gotchas. Longer content goes under `.agents/` referenced by `.agents/INDEX.md`.
rule.rationale: Agents auto-load AGENTS.md at every session start. Above ~80 lines, the context cost compounds across sessions; below 20, it's not useful routing.

rule.statement: AGENTS.md MUST include a `## Files` table with one row per significant source file: path, purpose. Generated / vendored dirs are listed with their generator.
rule.rationale: The file table is the single most useful section for agents. Without it, the agent grep-walks the dir; with it, it grep-targets.

rule.statement: Every directory containing source code has CLAUDE.md + AGENTS.md — not just repo roots, but subpackages, module folders, test dirs. Skip only empty `__init__.py`-only dirs with no logic.
rule.rationale: Partial coverage produces inconsistent agent behaviour. The pair is cheap (under 80 lines); the cost is paid once per dir.

rule.statement: Deep architecture / API references / decision records live under `.agents/` with `.agents/INDEX.md` as the catalogue. AGENTS.md mentions the INDEX path.
rule.rationale: Keeps AGENTS.md short while making heavy reference material discoverable on demand.

rule.statement: Stub rule for conclusion 'r1-explicit-trigger' referenced from 06-decision-tree.xml. Replace with the real testable rule that resolves this branch of the tree.
rule.rationale: Auto-added by fix-methodology-phase-d.py to keep tree refs resolvable.

rule.statement: Stub rule for conclusion 'r2-bounded-output' referenced from 06-decision-tree.xml. Replace with the real testable rule that resolves this branch of the tree.
rule.rationale: Auto-added by fix-methodology-phase-d.py to keep tree refs resolvable.

rule.statement: Stub rule for conclusion 'r3-evidence-anchored' referenced from 06-decision-tree.xml. Replace with the real testable rule that resolves this branch of the tree.
rule.rationale: Auto-added by fix-methodology-phase-d.py to keep tree refs resolvable.
